4506-t:transcriptType.label: Transcript type requested
4506-t:transcriptType.so: Tani waa nooca diiwaanka canshuurta ee aad ka codsanayso IRS-ka — tusaale ahaan koobi guud oo soo gudbintaadii canshuurta ah, ama taariikh faahfaahsan oo bixinaha iyo isbeddelada canshuurtaada.
4506-t:transcriptType.en: This is the type of tax record you're requesting from the IRS — for example, a copy of your filed return, or a detailed history of your tax payments and changes.

4506-t:yearsRequested.label: Years requested
4506-t:yearsRequested.so: Tani waa sannadaha canshuurta ee aad codsanayso diiwaankooda.
4506-t:yearsRequested.en: These are the tax years you're requesting records for.
